race.description: Domestic & Family Violence Prevention Month Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: CHARMED PASSAGE (8) had been racing okay but he was safely held last time out when seventh over 1000m at Toowoomba. Sound record at this distance with two wins and three minor placings from five runs and is sure to run well from the favourable draw. MOFEED (3) finished out of the money two starts back then was beaten 6 lengths when fourth over 1100m at Ipswich three-and-a-half weeks ago. Finds a nice race and can turn things around. VORKUTA (7) was doing his best work late last start to get up for third over 1200m at Gold Coast. Winkers come off this time. Rates well and expected to be competitive. AUSSIE ADAPTOR (10) has switched yards since finishing ninth five-and-a-half weeks ago over 1300m at Wodonga. Can measure up for the new barn and any market support must be noted.
